calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-266 competing-goals / switch-cost asymmetry on mode-governance-engagement substrate (use_external_task_drive); successor to 464c with occupancy-keyed readiness gate
items.note: Validation of the mode-governance-engagement substrate (ree-v3 use_external_task_drive, landed 2026-06-13 commit 13dece2). Successor (NOT supersede) of V3-EXQ-464c, which FAILed non_contributory because fraction_in_external_task=0.0 on both arms (no external_task salience SOURCE). TWO changes vs 464c: (1) use_external_task_drive=True (calibrated affinity_weight=3.0 / salience_weight=2.0 so a committed foraging step decisively contests external_task vs the dACC internal_planning push -- probe-verified non-vacuous: committed engagement ~1.0 -> aggregate 3.2 > enter_threshold 1.0 -> external_task wins+switches; uncommitted ~0.1 -> internal_planning wins); (2) the non-vacuity gate is RE-STATED to min_across_arms(fraction_in_external_task) > 0.1 (the SAME occupancy statistic C1 routes on) replacing the 464c n_switches>=1 gate. claim_ids=[MECH-266,SD-032a]; experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-266 provisional / SD-032a stable; pending_retest holds). DEPENDS_ON (unresolved): scaffolded_sd054_onboarding nav-competence (Stage-H) -- may legitimately self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if the agent doesn't forage/survive long enough; the contact + occupancy gates make that a non_contributory, never a false weakens. Dry-run: end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale (occupancy gate), validate_experiments --strict clean.

items.title: MECH-266 mode-stickiness / Hold-decay dose-response on mode-governance-engagement substrate (use_external_task_drive); successor to 467c with occupancy-keyed readiness gate
items.note: Validation of the mode-governance-engagement substrate (ree-v3 use_external_task_drive, landed 2026-06-13 commit 13dece2). Successor (NOT supersede) of V3-EXQ-467c, which FAILed non_contributory because fraction_in_external_task=0.0 / mean_dwell an episode-length artifact (no external_task salience SOURCE). TWO changes vs 464c: (1) use_external_task_drive=True (calibrated affinity_weight=3.0 / salience_weight=2.0 so a committed foraging step decisively contests external_task vs the dACC internal_planning push -- probe-verified non-vacuous: committed engagement ~1.0 -> aggregate 3.2 > enter_threshold 1.0 -> external_task wins+switches; uncommitted ~0.1 -> internal_planning wins); (2) the non-vacuity gate is RE-STATED to min over ratio arms of fraction_in_external_task > 0.1 (the SAME occupancy statistic the dose-response operates over) replacing the 464c n_switches>=1 gate. claim_ids=[MECH-266,SD-032a]; experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-266 provisional / SD-032a stable; pending_retest holds). DEPENDS_ON (unresolved): scaffolded_sd054_onboarding nav-competence (Stage-H) -- may legitimately self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if the agent doesn't forage/survive long enough; the contact + occupancy gates make that a non_contributory, never a false weakens. Dry-run: end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale (occupancy gate), validate_experiments --strict clean.

items.title: MECH-329 wanting-before-liking goal seeding (669a forced-feed-nursery fix)
items.note: Re-issue of degenerate V3-EXQ-669a (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-669a_2026-06-13: non_contributory/substrate_ceiling; anchor/write/p01=0 in ALL arms incl c4 positive control under the ecological InfantCurriculum GAP-2 z_goal-seeding ceiling). Same scientific question (MECH-329 wanting-before-liking ordering), harness fix: runs the 3-arm ordering test (wanting_first/liking_first/both_delayed) on the scaffolded_sd054_onboarding Stage-0 forced-feed nursery (z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0) so the MECH-189 super-ordinal write gate fires, mirroring V3-EXQ-588c. claim_ids=[MECH-329, MECH-189]. Pre-registered non-vacuity readiness gate (R1 both_delayed anchor>=1 AND total_writes>=1; R2 wanting-schedule manipulation took; R3 anchor-hierarchy max>=2) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_degenerate=false), NEVER a weakens, when unmet. Load-bearing scored criteria C1(anchor count)+C3(p01 complexity); C2(p01 writes) is a manipulation-check precondition.

items.title: MECH-057b trajectory-promotion-gate (relative completion bar): supersedes degenerate V3-EXQ-672
items.note: Re-author + re-queue of V3-EXQ-672 (self-reported DEGENERATE, mean_filtered_fraction_ARM_1=0, scoring-excluded by the 2026-06-13 AM governance cycle). ROOT CAUSE: 672 used an ABSOLUTE completion gate (completion_threshold=2.0 on the residue-completion score), which sat above the entire residue-cost distribution on this small/low-harm env -> the gate suppressed nothing -> the C1/C2 cross-arm contrast was vacuous. FIX: ARM_1 now promotes candidates by a DATA-RELATIVE quantile bar (suppress the highest-residue DROP_FRACTION=0.4 of the pool; >=MIN_CANDIDATES=2 always promoted), which adapts to the substrate's residue magnitude. Added a readiness precondition self-routing substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_degenerate=False, NOT a MECH-057b weakens) when mean_filtered_fraction_ARM_1 < FILTER_FLOOR=0.10 (the relative bar cannot bite a flat candidate pool, so filtered_fraction folds in the score-spread requirement). claim_ids=[MECH-057b] only (verified: tests the hippocampal completion-quality gate before E3, scoring on _score_trajectory = the same residue-completion score compute_completion_signal consumes). Dry-run smoke: gate filters 32->19 candidates (filtered_fraction=0.4062 vs 0.0 in 672); gate_engaged=True; non_degenerate=True; runs end-to-end; emit_outcome + validate_experiments --strict clean. 3 seeds x 2 arms x 500 train + 100 eval eps x 200 steps. check_degeneracy net on C1/C2 cross-arm groups retained.
